feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Credit management tolerance not working for Service orders
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have implemented 10% tolerance in credit management for Sales order via spro path: Financial Supply Chain Management > Credit Management > Integration with Accounts Receivable Accounting and Sales and Distribution > Integration with Sales and Distribution > Define Automatic Credit Control

We need to set the same rules for Service, but we couldn't find the same logic under Service order integration. It's causing a mismatch between the credit rules between the departments (Services x Sales). Is there a way to also activate a tolerance in Service orders?

Thanks and regards,

entry.title: SAP Business Client 8.0 - SU01 tcode - roles tab
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am using SAP Business Client 8.0. In SU01 tcode, if we navigate to roles tab for any user, it shows only 3 lines of roles. This is very cumbersome to use. Can we increase the display lines in this roles tab?

Best Regards,

Ashwini Pingle

entry.title: Process order settlement error
entry.content:
While running settlement of process order 1152878 in QS5 system, system is giving error Maintain an Adjustment account. 
Where as the order 1152873 got settled successfully. 

Please find attachment with screenshot for your reference.

entry.title: About note 100690
entry.content: I initially inquired about Note 100690, and the official response was to run report ZKOGLMNG. However, I couldn't find ZKOGLMNG. Could you tell me how to download or install this note?

entry.title: Schedule automatic payment - Payment medium - Payment advice - F110
entry.content:
Hello,

In NOVA solution, the payment process steps are:

  • Parameters creation - Profile: Accounting payable
  • Proposal management : Profile: Accounting payable
    • With payment medium 
    • Without Payment advice We need to create the payment file at proposal level due to file validation process out of SAP
  • Payment run- Profile: Treasury 
    • Post payments
    • Create Payment advice
    • No creation for XML file again as already validated and sent to the Bank.

We have tried modifying the authorization settings
Proposal: Accounts Payable profile: assign activity 15 - Create a payment document
Payment cycle: Treasury profile: remove activity 25 - Do not create a payment document

How can we resolve th

entry.title: SAP Build Work Zone Push Notifications not working on mobile devices
entry.content:
We have successfully deployed SAP build work zone along with the notifications feature. Everything is working as supposed except from push notifications on mobile devices, even though the notifications are visible on work zone site dashboard and via SAP mobile start application.

We can also see that all mobile devices have been registered for push notifications via mobile management console.

Please advise.

entry.title: Arrears By Net Due Date different between FBL5H and FBL5N
entry.content: There is a difference of values in the 'Arrears by Net Due Date' field in FBL5H and FBL5N for the same open item. In FBL5N the value is zero. We would like to know how these values are getting fetched and is this an expected behavior.

entry.title: Enhancement of the Profit Center column in the MB51 report.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

There is an issue related to the enhancement of the Profit Center column in the MB51 report. Currently, the Profit Center field is not available in MB51. This enhancement is required to verify whether the Profit Center is correctly captured in the accounting document entries and to help identify and resolve related discrepancies.

entry.title: CSapEditiorCtrl::GetObject: Object 164 does not exist in SAP GUI 800.
entry.content: I encounter the error 'CSapEditiorCtrl::GetObject: Object 164 does not exist' when trying to edit text in Smart Forms while using SAP GUI 800. This issue started after upgrading to SAP GUI 740 Patch 5 or newer. It is caused by the removal of the legacy SAPscript Text Editor controls from the SAP GUI, replaced by the MS Word editor. The error suggests a missing control object issue, likely related to the missing legacy editor controls that are no longer included by default. To resolve this, I need to either reinstall the SAPscript Legacy Text Editor component from SAP or properly configure MS Word as the editor, ensuring the correct settings are applied to avoid this error.

entry.title: In fiori Navigation panel, selected filters are truncated and not visible
entry.content:
After selecting some data in the filters of the Navigation panel (standard fiori apps), we cannot see the values these are truncated 

 

The filter criteria set are all not directly visible completely: every entry seems truncated to show the "x" within the field. 
It is thus very annoying and especially time consuming (for all Fiori users) to verify if filters have been set correctly.
It would be very much appreciated if there is a possibility to enlarge these icons/tokens somehow

entry.title: ME21 Incoterms is missing
entry.content:
Dear Experts:

After upgrading to S4, the Incoterms field for t-code: ME21 is missing.

How do I restore the Incoterms field for S4 ME21?

Please help to check attached file for detail.

Regards,Joanne

entry.title: Asset Accounting Depreciation varience issue
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are working in SAP S/4HANA 2023 version.

We are facing an issue in Asset Accounting. After changing the depreciation key and useful life of an asset, the recalculated depreciation is not reflecting correctly.

We have changed useful life of asset 20 to 15 years but still the depreciation is calculating for 20 years.

Kindly provide the solution.

Thanks & Regards,

Fi& Co consultant.

entry.title: Display Notifications List(IW29) Fiori App- There is no Spreadsheet option to downloadd
entry.content:
Hi SAP, 

Issue is quite simple.

IW29 Display PM Notifications Fiori App. not showing the option- Spreadsheet when try to download, it's happening in our QA@ Quality system, but this is there in our Production(PA1) system. I have attached screengrabs which are self-explanatory.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: F110 Payment Work flow approval request not triggered to the two agents
entry.content:
Is is required to set up two workflow agents to approve a payment in F110 payment run approver workflow.

Standard work flow template - WS23200018 

Two agents were defined in Agent determination for the said payment amount range.

The 2 approvers do get the workflow request to approve the payment proposal, however, after one approver approves the request it passes the whole workflow to proceed to payment even without the approval from the second approver.

Could you please advice how to resolve this.

entry.title: Custom field - Segment is not visible in BP screen
entry.content:
Hi,

one of the custom field which is not visible in BP screen under Vendor general tab. We have diagonised  and checked the field in screen level it repaced under different tab after the 2025 upgrade.  we need your help to fix this issue. Kindly go through the attached document.

entry.title: To configure error messages for costing run
entry.content:
Need to configure below messages as "Error" message for costing run.

These messages are not available in the transaction OPR4_CK.

  1. CK461 : Routing either does not exist or contains no operations
  2. CK858 : No suitable or valid Production version found
  3. CK756 : Material in plant cannot be costed

entry.title: HANAパラメータ設定
entry.content:
お世話になります。

HANA 2.0 SPS08 Rev89のHANAシステムにパラメータを削除したいのですが、設定後に再起動をするとパラメータが復活してしまいます。

こちらのパラメータの意味と削除する方法はどのようにすればいいのでしょうか？

パラメータ：singletenant = yes

 

よろしくお願いします。

entry.title: validation to prevent invoice reversal once asset capitalization is completed
entry.content:
Hi Team

PO: 4210000053

Company code: SF01

We have observed that all the IR entries associated to this PO were reversed although these were already capitalized. 

Attached the invoice and invoice reversal document numbers and attached the ECQ system configuration details.

Please confirm the tables where data is stored after posting the IR entry for a CWIP asset and after creating the settlement rule in CJIC and specifically the tables where settlement rule data is maintained.

Also, let me know whether we can implement a validation to prevent invoice reversal once asset capitalization is completed. Additionally, specify which tables need to be checked for creating this validation.

 

Regards,

Ravi Kiran

entry.title: Cyclic Count issue in MICN transaction
entry.content:
I am using cyclic counting and executing transaction MICN. However, after executing it at the plant and storage location level with the planned count date set as the current date till (31.12.2026), the system is showing some materials as “Cyclic Count Breached.”

The planned count date is marked in red, and these materials have not yet been counted. Additionally, the material creation date does not seem to match with planned date.

Also, could you please confirm the following:
If the A indicator has an interval of 4, will the planning calendar run from April to March, or will it always consider the last PID (Physical Inventory Document) date for scheduling?

entry.title: Not able to add field from system variant to line item
entry.content:
Help to add the above field at item level but unable to add it

  1. Check the field at system variant field in item configuration tab
  2. make the field visible at item level main screen
  1. Business wants to add the detail data in the given field named "GS_MSR_SALES_ITEM-INSPECTION_COMMENT (Comment)  which is required by the customer .
